data.title: Xray launches AI-powered testing with Sembi IQ, enabling smarter and safer testing with human-in-the-loop feature.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Xray, a top test management solution for Jira, has introduced AI-powered testing features through the Sembi IQ platform. This new suite incorporates human-in-the-loop intelligence characteristics. Utilizing Sembi IQ's centralized AI structure, Xray's AI functions enhance testing processes by integrating intelligence seamlessly into established workflows. In contrast to instantaneous generators, Xray empowers testers to assess, modify, and opt for AI-generated suggestions. This introduction aims to make testing procedures more intelligent, secure, and productive.

data.title: Advanced Electronics Tech for AI Research Report 2026-2036: Profiles of 400+ Companies in Neuromorphic, Quantum, and Edge AI Processors.
data.description: Dublin - A new report, "Advanced Electronics Technologies for AI 2026-2036: Neuromorphic Computing, Quantum Computing, and Edge AI Processors," is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report examines the intersection of three cutting-edge electronics technologies impacting the artificial intelligence sector: neuromorphic computing, quantum computing, and edge AI processors. The analysis delves into market forecasts and trends for these technologies between 2026 and 2036.

data.title: VRS creates Iron Eagle Capital to tackle pricing issues in lower markets, offering solutions for distressed deals.
data.description: A recently launched platform is tackling pricing issues in the middle and lower markets by offering comprehensive solutions to optimize value in distressed, special situations, and unique transactions. The company, VRS Restructuring Services, LLC, was established by Jeffrey T. and is based in Boston. The platform aims to provide assistance in transactions that fall outside conventional norms, utilizing a holistic approach to maximize value. The initiative comes in response to challenges faced in pricing strategies within these markets.

data.title: Unaric acquires DESelect in eight-figure deal to enhance Salesforce AI capabilities, assisting businesses in scaling smarter.
data.description: A UK tech company, Unaric, has recently acquired DESelect, a Salesforce Independent Software Vendor (ISV) based in Belgium and the US, in an eight-figure deal. Unaric, founded in 2023 by Peter Lindhom, James Gasteen, Moritz Birke, and Neil Crawford, specializes in helping Salesforce customers utilize AI through its range of applications and AI agents. This acquisition marks a significant expansion for Unaric, allowing them to further assist customers in scaling efficiently, increasing speed, and enhancing overall experiences.

data.title: Logitech Spot wins TIME Best Invention of 2025 for radar-based sensor enhancing productivity and room health - #innovation.
data.description: Logitech has revealed that Logitech Spot, a workplace sensor designed to monitor occupancy and environmental conditions, has been recognized as a Best Invention of 2025 by TIME. The sensor, utilizing radar technology, addresses obstacles that may affect employee productivity and room well-being. Acknowledged in the productivity sector, Logitech Spot stands out among innovations in various fields including AI, robotics, and aerospace, reshaping our lifestyles and perspectives on what can be achieved. This accolade showcases the device's potential in enhancing work environments and overall efficiency.
